items.a: Not until you ask us to. The 4-question form is a self-reported estimate — no hard pull.
No. We use the rental income, not your personal income. That's what DSCR means.

items.q: Can I close in my LLC?
items.a: Yes. Most of our clients do.
580 at 50% LTV. Most clients are 680+. Below 580 is rare.

items.q: How long does it take to close?
items.a: ~15 business days from submission to wire on a typical clean file.
Yes, standard 5/4/3/2/1. Other structures available — ask your LO.

items.q: Can I use this for a short-term rental?
items.a: Yes. We use your trailing 12-month gross revenue.

items.q: What states do you fund loans in?
items.a: We actively fund DSCR loans across most of the U.S. Start the 4 questions and we'll confirm coverage for your state before we price anything.
